---
pagetitle: "Writing — Yash Tiwari"
page-layout: custom
---

```{=html}
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     NAVBAR
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<header class="navbar">
  <a href="index.html" class="nav-logo">YT.</a>

  <nav class="nav-links">
    <a href="index.html"    class="nav-link">Home</a>
    <a href="projects.html" class="nav-link">Projects</a>
    <a href="blog.html"     class="nav-link">Writing</a>
    <a href="resume.html"   class="nav-link">Resume</a>
    <a href="about.html"    class="nav-link">About</a>
  </nav>

  <div class="nav-right">
    <a href="https://github.com/rsm-ytiwari" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="nav-icon" aria-label="GitHub">
      <svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
        <path d="M9 19c-5 1.5-5-2.5-7-3m14 6v-3.87a3.37 3.37 0 0 0-.94-2.61c3.14-.35 6.44-1.54 6.44-7A5.44 5.44 0 0 0 20 4.77 5.07 5.07 0 0 0 19.91 1S18.73.65 16 2.48a13.38 13.38 0 0 0-7 0C6.27.65 5.09 1 5.09 1A5.07 5.07 0 0 0 5 4.77a5.44 5.44 0 0 0-1.5 3.78c0 5.42 3.3 6.61 6.44 7A3.37 3.37 0 0 0 9 18.13V22"/>
      </svg>
    </a>
    <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/yash-tiwari-here/" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="nav-icon" aria-label="LinkedIn">
      <svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
        <path d="M16 8a6 6 0 0 1 6 6v7h-4v-7a2 2 0 0 0-2-2 2 2 0 0 0-2 2v7h-4v-7a6 6 0 0 1 6-6z"/>
        <rect x="2" y="9" width="4" height="12"/><circle cx="4" cy="4" r="2"/>
      </svg>
    </a>
    <button class="nav-icon" aria-label="Search">
      <svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
        <circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8"/><line x1="21" y1="21" x2="16.65" y2="16.65"/>
      </svg>
    </button>
    <button class="theme-pill" id="theme-toggle" aria-label="Toggle theme">
      <span id="theme-icon">
        <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
          <path d="M21 12.79A9 9 0 1 1 11.21 3 7 7 0 0 0 21 12.79z"/>
        </svg>
      </span>
      <span id="theme-label">Dark</span>
    </button>
  </div>
</header>


<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     PAGE BANNER
     EDIT the subtitle copy here. The Twain quote is intentional.
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="page-banner">
  <div class="banner-label">Writing</div>
  <h1 class="banner-title">Short letters.</h1>
  <p class="banner-sub" style="font-style:italic; margin-bottom:10px;">
    "I didn't have time to write you a short letter,<br>
    so I wrote you a long one." — Mark Twain
  </p>
  <p class="banner-sub">
    Posts that took longer to write than they take to read.
  </p>
</div>


<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     BLOG GRID — rendered from blog.json
     EDIT blog.json to add, remove, or update posts.
     Set draft: true to hide a post without deleting it.
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="projects-section">

  <div class="projects-stats">
    <span id="post-count">—</span> Posts
  </div>

  <div class="filter-bar" id="filter-bar">
    <button class="filter-btn active" data-filter="all">All</button>
  </div>

  <p id="empty-state"
     style="display:none; color:var(--text-muted); font-size:14px; padding:40px 0;">
    Nothing here yet in this category.
  </p>

  <div id="blog-grid" class="cards-grid"></div>

</div>


<script>
(function () {
  const CATEGORY_ORDER = [
    'Data Science',
    'Marketing',
    'Philosophy',
    'Future'
  ];

  function cardHTML(item) {
    const tags = (item.tags || []).slice(0, 4)
      .map(function (t) { return '<span class="p-tag">' + t + '</span>'; })
      .join('');
    const link = item.href || '#';
    const catAttr = Array.isArray(item.category)
      ? item.category.join(',')
      : (item.category || '');

    return [
      '<div class="p-card b-card" data-category="' + catAttr + '">',
      '  <div class="p-body">',
      '    <div class="p-meta">',
      '      <span class="p-year">' + item.date + '</span>',
      '      <span class="b-read-time">' + item.read_time + ' read</span>',
      '    </div>',
      '    <div class="p-title">' + item.title + '</div>',
      '    <div class="p-desc">' + item.summary + '</div>',
      '    <div class="p-tags">' + tags + '</div>',
      '    <a href="' + link + '" class="p-more">Read →</a>',
      '  </div>',
      '</div>'
    ].join('\n');
  }

  function updateEmptyState() {
    var visible = Array.from(
      document.querySelectorAll('#blog-grid .p-card')
    ).filter(function (c) { return c.style.display !== 'none'; });
    var el = document.getElementById('empty-state');
    if (el) el.style.display = visible.length === 0 ? 'block' : 'none';
  }

  const path = window.location.pathname;
  const base = path.includes('/portfolio_website/') ? '/portfolio_website/' : './';

  fetch(base + 'blog.json')
    .then(function (r) { return r.json(); })
    .then(function (posts) {

      /* Filter out drafts */
      var live = posts.filter(function (p) { return !p.draft; });

      /* Stats bar */
      document.getElementById('post-count').textContent = live.length;

      /* Inject category filter buttons */
      var cats = Array.from(new Set(
        live.reduce(function (acc, p) {
          return acc.concat(
            Array.isArray(p.category) ? p.category : [p.category || 'Other']
          );
        }, [])
      )).sort(function (a, b) {
        var aIndex = CATEGORY_ORDER.indexOf(a);
        var bIndex = CATEGORY_ORDER.indexOf(b);
        if (aIndex === -1 && bIndex === -1) return a.localeCompare(b);
        if (aIndex === -1) return 1;
        if (bIndex === -1) return -1;
        return aIndex - bIndex;
      });

      var bar = document.getElementById('filter-bar');
      cats.forEach(function (cat) {
        var btn = document.createElement('button');
        btn.className    = 'filter-btn';
        btn.dataset.filter = cat;
        btn.textContent  = cat;
        bar.appendChild(btn);
      });

      /* Render cards */
      document.getElementById('blog-grid').innerHTML = live.map(cardHTML).join('');

      /* Click-to-navigate on card body */
      document.querySelectorAll('#blog-grid .p-card').forEach(function (card) {
        card.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
          if (e.target.closest('a')) return;
          var link = this.querySelector('.p-more');
          if (link && link.getAttribute('href') !== '#') {
            this.blur();
            window.location.href = link.href;
          }
        });
      });

      /* Filter bar */
      bar.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
        var btn = e.target.closest('.filter-btn');
        if (!btn) return;
        document.querySelectorAll('.filter-btn')
          .forEach(function (b) { b.classList.remove('active'); });
        btn.classList.add('active');
        var filter = btn.dataset.filter;
        document.querySelectorAll('#blog-grid .p-card').forEach(function (card) {
          var cardCats = card.dataset.category
            ? card.dataset.category.split(',') : [];
          card.style.display = (filter === 'all' || cardCats.includes(filter)) ? '' : 'none';
        });
        updateEmptyState();
      });

    })
    .catch(function (err) {
      console.error('Could not load blog.json:', err);
    });
})();
</script>

<div class="toast" id="toast">✓ Copied to clipboard</div>
```
